main.description: Record endorsing a vit cap or skill.

subject.description: The cap or skill being endorsed.

ref.description: Three lowercase words separated by dashes, e.g. fast-cache-invalidation

beacon.description: Beacon URI scoping this vouch to a project. Included for cap vouches, omitted for skill vouches.

createdAt.description: Client-declared timestamp when this vouch was created.
